prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `0c786b71`.
codex_response:
Implemented `0c786b71` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is the four-way mirror tiling: bottom-right is the input, bottom-left is its left-right mirror, top-right is its top-bottom mirror, and top-left is the 180° rotation. The summary hint was used, not discarded; both hint files matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` and no new primitive were needed.

Files:
- [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0c786b71/__init__.py#L1)
- [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0c786b71/verifier.py#L1)
- [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_0c786b71/generator.py#L1)

Validation:
- Official examples: `4/4` passed with `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 0c786b71`.
- Built 1000 verified examples into [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0c786b71/task.json) and [examples](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0c786b71/examples).
- Preview outputs exist at [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0c786b71/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0c786b71/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0c786b71/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/0c786b71/previews/preview_03.png).
- The generator stays on-family by fixing dense `3x4` inputs with exactly 3 nonzero colors and filtering out trivial self-symmetric or monochrome-row/column cases; I spot-checked generated examples and opened `preview_01.png` via PIL.
